# Sklearn Support Coverage

Tracking exhaustive coverage of the `sklearn` python package API.


## Detailed API

| Object Name | Type | Signature |
|---|---|---|
| `base.BaseEstimator` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.BiclusterMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.ClassNamePrefixFeaturesOutMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.ClassifierMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.ClassifierTags` | Class | `(poor_score: bool, multi_class: bool, multi_label: bool)` |
| `base.ClusterMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.DensityMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.InconsistentVersionWarning` | Class | `(estimator_name, current_sklearn_version, original_sklearn_version)` |
| `base.MetaEstimatorMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.MultiOutputMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.OneToOneFeatureMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.OutlierMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.ParamsDict` | Class | `(params, non_default, estimator_class, doc_link)` |
| `base.RegressorMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.RegressorTags` | Class | `(poor_score: bool)` |
| `base.ReprHTMLMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.Tags` | Class | `(estimator_type: str \| None, target_tags: TargetTags, transformer_tags: TransformerTags \| None, classifier_tags: ClassifierTags \| None, regressor_tags: RegressorTags \| None, array_api_support: bool, no_validation: bool, non_deterministic: bool, requires_fit: bool, _skip_test: bool, input_tags: InputTags)` |
| `base.TargetTags` | Class | `(required: bool, one_d_labels: bool, two_d_labels: bool, positive_only: bool, multi_output: bool, single_output: bool)` |
| `base.TransformerMixin` | Class | `(...)` |
| `base.TransformerTags` | Class | `(preserves_dtype: list[str])` |
| `base.check_array` | Function | `(array, accept_sparse, accept_large_sparse, dtype, order, copy, force_writeable, ensure_all_finite, ensure_non_negative, ensure_2d, allow_nd, ensure_min_samples, ensure_min_features, estimator, input_name)` |
| `base.check_is_fitted` | Function | `(estimator, attributes, msg, all_or_any)` |
| `base.clone` | Function | `(estimator, safe)` |
| `base.config_context` | Function | `(assume_finite, working_memory, print_changed_only, display, pairwise_dist_chunk_size, enable_cython_pairwise_dist, array_api_dispatch, transform_output, enable_metadata_routing, skip_parameter_validation)` |
| `base.estimator_html_repr` | Function | `(estimator)` |
| `base.get_config` | Function | `()` |
| `base.get_tags` | Function | `(estimator) -> Tags` |
| `base.is_classifier` | Function | `(estimator)` |
| `base.is_clusterer` | Function | `(estimator)` |
| `base.is_outlier_detector` | Function | `(estimator)` |
| `base.is_pandas_na` | Function | `(x)` |
| `base.is_regressor` | Function | `(estimator)` |
| `base.is_scalar_nan` | Function | `(x)` |
| `base.validate_parameter_constraints` | Function | `(parameter_constraints, params, caller_name)` |
